title: New transport type: localdocker://
body:
We want to be able to build an image then use skopeo copy to sign and push to a registry. For example:

```
docker build foo/bar
skopeo copy --sign-by me@example.com localdocker://foo/bar docker://reg.example.com/foo/bar
```

cc @baude

comments.body: (Should be implemented in https://github.com/containers/image and require no support directly in skopeo.)
